_researchNotes: Sparse variant: same official 'New lead from {Name}' subject (WeddingWire Vendor Support article 115003720143 via Zendesk API), sender pros@weddingwire.com (whitelist per article 115003741366). Article 360027979832 says inquiry details 'may include' name, event date, phone, email — i.e. phone is optional on the couple's form, so this fixture omits it. Date appears in US numeric form (MM/DD/YYYY) as couples type it into the form; guest count is the range bucket the storefront contact form offers ('100-150'), which a parser must NOT collapse into a single invented number. Short one-line message. No Reply-To header variant: client email appears only as a labeled body line.
subject: New lead from Marcus Webb
textBody:
You have a new lead!

Marcus Webb

Wedding Date: 10/03/2026
Number of Guests: 100-150
Email: m.webb.events@example.net

Message:
How much for 5 hours of DJ and MC?

Reply directly to this email to respond, or reply within your account.

The WeddingWire Team
